policy: HARNESS_88 must not install local tools, download Codex skills, connect MCP servers, or connect Codex plugins automatically. If a resource is downloaded from GitHub, the exact repository URL must be recorded here and approved by the user before download.

local.git.label: Git
local.git.notes: Official Git source repository. Platform installers may still come from official package managers or git-scm.com after user approval.

local.node.label: Node.js
local.node.notes: Official Node.js source repository. Platform installers may still come from nodejs.org or package managers after user approval.

skill.playwright.label: Playwright Codex skill
skill.playwright.notes: Record the exact user-approved Codex skill repository URL before downloading a Playwright skill. Do not substitute the framework repository for a skill repository unless the user explicitly approves it.

skill.gh-cli.label: gh-cli Codex skill
skill.gh-cli.notes: Record the exact user-approved Codex skill repository URL before downloading a gh-cli skill.

skill.imagegen.label: imagegen Codex skill
skill.imagegen.notes: Record the exact user-approved Codex skill repository URL before downloading an imagegen skill.

mcp.serena.label: Serena MCP
mcp.serena.notes: Record the exact user-approved MCP repository URL before downloading or connecting Serena from GitHub.

mcp.context7.label: Context7 MCP
mcp.context7.notes: Record the exact user-approved MCP repository URL before downloading or connecting Context7 from GitHub.

mcp.filesystem.label: Filesystem MCP
mcp.filesystem.notes: Record the exact user-approved MCP repository URL before downloading or connecting a filesystem server from GitHub.

mcp.sqlite.label: SQLite MCP
mcp.sqlite.notes: Record the exact user-approved MCP repository URL before downloading or connecting a SQLite server from GitHub.

mcp.node-repl.label: node_repl MCP
mcp.node-repl.notes: Record the exact user-approved MCP repository URL before downloading or connecting node_repl from GitHub.
